response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and a broad technical background, but his experience is largely in full-stack, web, and mobile development rather than the specialized hardware and AI accelerator optimization required for this role. His work with low-latency systems and embedded projects shows some relevant technical depth, but there is limited evidence of direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization.
strengths: Extensive experience with low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic, real-time data processing).
Strong background in software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and system architecture design.
Diverse technical exposure, including embedded systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization.
Most recent roles focus on full-stack and web development rather than hardware-software co-design.
No explicit mention of SIMD/MIMD architectures, deep neural network training, or performance bottleneck analysis for AI workloads.
